ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property's location */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the houses in the property's neighborhood */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the property */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the property's neighborhood */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the property's neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the residents in the property's neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median value of the houses in the property's neighborhood */,
  "ocean_proximity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ocean proximity of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "number_of_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., for sale, sold, rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_ocean_proximity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ocean_proximity_id") REFERENCES ocean_proximity ("ocean_proximity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ocean_proximity" (
  "ocean_proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ocean proximity category */,
  "ocean_proximity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ocean proximity category (e.g., <1H OCEAN, NEAR OCEAN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ocean proximity category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ocean_proximity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_regions" (
  "property_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-region relationship */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_regions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, sales) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_versions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_data" (
  "property_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property data record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property version */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property's location */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the houses in the property's neighborhood */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the property */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the property's neighborhood */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the property's neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the residents in the property's neighborhood */,
  "median_house_value" INTEGER /* Median value of the houses in the property's neighborhood */,
  "ocean_proximity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ocean proximity of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES property_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_data_ocean_proximity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ocean_proximity_id") REFERENCES ocean_proximity ("ocean_proximity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_comments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audits_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., general, termite) */,
  "inspection_result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_inspections_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_applications_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the offer */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_amount" REAL /* Amount of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_offers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_offers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
